subcodes.first_line: O thou who dost raise high the banners of praise and glorification of God! His honor the Khan hath arrived at this Most Great Prison and attained unto visitation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناشر لوای ذکر و رافع اعلام ثنای الهی جناب خان در این سجن اعظم وارد و بزیارات
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the power of words; of speech
